left_elbow.label: Left Elbow
left_elbow.description: Angle at left elbow (shoulder → elbow → wrist)

right_elbow.label: Right Elbow
right_elbow.description: Angle at right elbow (shoulder → elbow → wrist)

left_shoulder.label: Left Shoulder
left_shoulder.description: Angle at left shoulder (elbow → shoulder → hip)

right_shoulder.label: Right Shoulder
right_shoulder.description: Angle at right shoulder (elbow → shoulder → hip)

left_hip.label: Left Hip
left_hip.description: Angle at left hip (shoulder → hip → knee)

right_hip.label: Right Hip
right_hip.description: Angle at right hip (shoulder → hip → knee)

left_knee.label: Left Knee
left_knee.description: Angle at left knee (hip → knee → ankle)

right_knee.label: Right Knee
right_knee.description: Angle at right knee (hip → knee → ankle)

left_ankle.label: Left Ankle
left_ankle.description: Angle at left ankle (knee → ankle → foot)

right_ankle.label: Right Ankle
right_ankle.description: Angle at right ankle (knee → ankle → foot)

left_wrist.label: Left Wrist
left_wrist.description: Angle at left wrist (elbow → wrist → pinky)

right_wrist.label: Right Wrist
right_wrist.description: Angle at right wrist (elbow → wrist → pinky)

neck.label: Neck
neck.description: Midpoint of left and right shoulders

hip_center.label: Hip Center
hip_center.description: Midpoint of left and right hips

neck_tilt.label: Neck Tilt
neck_tilt.description: Head/Neck tilt (Nose -> Neck Midpoint -> Hip Center)
